headline: Paradigm Health Announces Collaboration with the FDA to Transform Regulatory Review of Clinical Trial Data
summary: Today, Paradigm Health announced the launch of a landmark research collaboration with the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA) focused on advancing a new model to accelerate clinical trial execution and regulatory review. The new model, already operational in a Phase 2 and Phase 1b trial, uses Paradigm Health's technology-enabled Study Conduct platform to enable real-time review by the FDA, by automating data collection and analysis, and streamlining the reporting of key safety and efficacy sig

headline: Amgen to Report Q1 Earnings: Can It Keep the Beat Streak Alive?
summary: Amgen heads into Q1 earnings with growth from key drugs offset by pricing pressure, patent losses, and biosimilar competition.

headline: Goldman Sachs' Asad Haider on the stocks impacted by new heart attack prevention drug trials
summary: Asad Haider, Goldman Sachs, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk new heart attack prevention drug trials and which companies are poised to benefit from the drugs. Note: Clip originally aired 4/27/2026.

headline: FDA claims Amgen drug data were ‘manipulated’; Erasca slides despite ‘home run’ results
summary: Tavneos’ original developer hid a study analysis and then altered data, the FDA alleged. Elsewhere, Erasca’s RAS drug was met with skepticism and Rocket Pharma sold a voucher.

headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: Despite geopolitical friction, the stock market enters the final week of April at record highs fueled by Mag7 earnings optimism and hopes for a diplomatic resolution to the US-Iran stalemate
